title: Phunware Announces Retirement of CEO Mike Snavely and Appoints Stephen Chen as Interim CEO
text: Phunware Announces Retirement of CEO Mike Snavely and Appoints Stephen Chen as Interim CEO. Key Details: Phunware announced that CEO Michael Snavely has retired and resigned from his position. Stephen Chen, the former Board Chairperson, has taken over as interim CEO effective October 22, 2024. Leadership Comments: Chen expressed enthusiasm about the transition, stating: I am proud and excited to assume the role of interim CEO as we prepare to embark on new opportunities in generative AI, predictive analytics, and cloud-based services. Snavely reflected positively on his tenure, noting that Leading Phunware as CEO has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my career, and expressed confidence in the company's future positioning while indicating his intention to pursue retirement. Strategic Direction: The company is pivoting toward AI-driven technologies and broader digital engagement solutions, launching a new microsite to help businesses understand generative AI applications with mobile technologies.
